sourcePrompt: A medium barracks tent, a long ridge-line canvas tent about nine meters long. Vertical canvas side walls rise to a peaked roof along a ridge with a stovepipe poking through, evenly spaced guy ropes stake out both eaves, and the entrance flaps at one end are tied back showing the dark interior. Olive-drab canvas, orderly billeting. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
